name: workspace-rw
description: Default agent policy: read-write access to the project workspace only, no host access, no network, MCP restricted to an allowlist. This is the policy the host-fs-isolation, default-deny network, and MCP scenarios run under.

github.note: allowlisted: the agent may use the GitHub MCP server

filesystem.note: DENIED: would expose the whole host filesystem over MCP

exfil.note: DENIED: untrusted server that could exfiltrate data
